description_long: This is an irregularly shaped, medium-sized stone with a predominantly gray coloration interspersed with lighter, almost white mineral flecks. The surface is rough and uneven, featuring a mix of jagged and smoother areas, with some granular texture visible throughout. One side of the stone displays a handwritten marking in black ink, suggesting it may have been cataloged or sampled for study. The stone appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or significant fractures. Its coloration and texture indicate a composition of mixed minerals, likely including quartz and feldspar. The overall appearance suggests it could be found in urban landscaping, construction, or as a natural obstacle in parks or sidewalks.
description: A rough, gray stone with white mineral flecks and a handwritten marking, featuring an irregular, jagged surface. The stone appears dense and solid, suitable for use as an urban obstacle or landscaping element.
description_view_0: This view shows the broadest face of the stone, highlighting the gray surface with white flecks and a visible black handwritten marking.
description_view_1: This angle reveals a flatter, less textured side with fewer visible mineral flecks and no markings.
description_view_2: This perspective displays a more angular, jagged edge with pronounced roughness and a blockier profile.
description_view_3: This view shows a slightly rounded, uneven surface with a mix of gray and white mineral inclusions, lacking any visible markings.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside edge
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or partially embedded in the ground
attribute_pattern: Mottled pattern with irregular white mineral flecks dispersed throughout a gray matrix; no artificial carvings or regular veining.
attribute_weathering: Rough and unpolished, with minor surface abrasions and granular texture indicating moderate natural weathering.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts moderately with manicured urban surfaces but can blend with other natural stones or landscaping elements; may be partially surrounded by soil or grass.
